title: rubus zeyheri
intro: Rubus zeyheri, also known as the Cape raspberry or Zeyher's raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, Rubusaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to its high content of salicylic acid and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rubus zeyheri include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Rubus zeyheri can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat fever, rheumatism, and other conditions.
